meaning: n.停止,暂停,中断vt.使停止,使立定vi.立定,停止,踌躇,有缺点
examples: The leading car came to a halt.
The bus shuddered to a halt.
The car squealed to a halt.
Barely five minutes later, we screeched to a halt next to a tangle of vine, branches and bush.
But as soon as Mr Kamei took office in September, he signalled a halt to privatisation.
